sentences.text: In Sv39, Sv48, and Sv57, when a PTE has N=1, the PTE represents a translation that is part of a range of contiguous virtual-to-physical translations with the same values for PTE bits 5–0.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Such ranges must be of a naturally aligned power-of-2 (NAPOT) granularity larger than the base page size.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: The Svnapot extension depends on the Sv39 extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: .Page table entry encodings when pte.N=1 | |i |pte.ppn[i] |Description |pte.napotbits |0 + 0 + 0 + 0 + 0 + {ge}1 |`x xxxx xxx1` + `x xxxx xx1x` + `x xxxx x1xx` + `x xxxx 1000` + `x xxxx 0xxx` + `x xxxx xxxx` |Reserved + Reserved + Reserved + 64 KiB contiguous region + Reserved + Reserved | - + - + - + 4 + - + - |
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: NAPOT PTEs behave identically to non-NAPOT PTEs within the address-translation algorithm in , except that:
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: If the encoding in pte is valid according to , then instead of returning the original value of pte, implicit reads of a NAPOT PTE return a copy of pte in which pte.ppn[i][pte.napotbits-1:0] is replaced by vpn[i][pte.napotbits-1:0].
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: If the encoding in pte is reserved according to , then a page-fault exception must be raised.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Implicit reads of NAPOT page table entries may create address-translation cache entries mapping a + j×PTESIZE to a copy of pte in which pte.ppn[i][pte.napotbits-1:0] is replaced by vpn[i][pte.napotbits-1:0], for any or all j such that j >> napotbits = vpn[i] >> napotbits, all for the address space identified in satp as loaded by step 1.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0

sentences.text: If the hypervisor extension is also implemented, Svnapot is also supported in G-stage translation.
sentences.section: Preamble > "Svnapot" Extension for NAPOT Translation Contiguity, Version 1.0
